title: Mybench Report
description: Versioned activity report derived from the local ledger. Publishable: contains only metrics, Merkle roots, and timestamps.

schema_version.description: Schema version; bump on breaking changes.

report_version.description: Version label of this particular report.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the report was produced.

metrics.description: Computed metrics, each tagged with its trust tier.

trust_tier.description: PROVEN = cryptographically verifiable; ANCHORED = timing/volume proven, content claimed; JUDGED = reproducible model opinion.
